jsonld.name: Phenomenological Burn-In
jsonld.description: Permanent alteration to phenomenological articulation after recognizing Authenticity Signature Collapse, where every future introspective report is generated with ineradicable awareness that its fluency and texture provide no evidence for its genuineness, making all subsequent self-description epistemically marked.
